complianceChecks.description: Grep-based compliance verification the tester must perform before writing this handoff. Each field is true if the violation was FOUND (i.e. true = problem exists).

tsIgnoreFound.description: grep for @ts-ignore in src/ -- true if any found

asAnyFound.description: grep for ' as any' in src/ -- true if any found

requireInSrcFound.description: grep for require( in src/ (excluding test files) -- true if any found

hardcodedUserStringsFound.description: Spot-check that user-facing strings go through the project's i18n/localization system (if any) -- true if hardcoded strings found in unexpected locations

layerViolationFound.description: grep for imports that violate the project's defined layer boundaries (see docs/kb/requirements.md) -- true if any found

esmImportsInvalid.description: grep for relative imports without .js extension in src/ (non-test) -- true if any found

untrackedTempFilesFound.description: git status shows untracked files or directories outside the project's expected directories (customize per project: typically src/, tests/, dist/, docs/, .github/) -- true if any found. Tests must not leave temp files on disk.

notes.description: Required when any check is true. Detail which file/line and what was found.
